name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
👑 Spring/Summer New Arrival BESACE TRIOMPHE, a VVIP latest style and pre-order from the official website
Style No.: Size: 24.5×17x4cm, Chain Length: 30cm
Triomphe Black & Gold BESACE TRIOMPHE glossy calfskin chain. Overall Style: Very grand. Black & Gold is still the classic, so gorgeous.
#Length has been increased, so it won't feel like a shoulder bag anymore.
Weight isn't light, but acceptable. The bag body uses hard calfskin with plenty of capacity for a phone, powder, tissues, and earphones!
Wear it with a motorcycle leather jacket, it's just too cool. Go for it.
